title: Remove embedded Google Maps iframe

requirements.text: Remove the embedded Google Maps iframe from the contact section in App.tsx while preserving the text address display 'Choriya Township Bypass Road, Kurduvadi-413208'
acceptanceCriteria: The Google Maps iframe element is completely removed from the rendered page
The address text 'Choriya Township Bypass Road, Kurduvadi-413208' remains visible and properly formatted
The contact section layout adjusts gracefully without the map component
No broken references or console errors related to the removed map

constraints: Do not modify the backend/main.mo file as this is a frontend-only change
Preserve all other existing sections: header, business hours, contact information, business details, about section, and footer
Maintain the existing medical-themed styling and color scheme
nonGoals: Modifying the address text content or formatting
Changing any other sections of the website
